meta.name: More Deconstructing the Beatles
meta.description: More Deconstructing the Beatles, hosted by "Beatle-ologist" Scott Freiman, is an educational documentary series analyzing the Fab Four's music, recording techniques, and history. It explores specific albums and songs through studio outtakes, interviews, and deep musical analysis. Episodes cover topics like A Hard Day's Night, Penny Lane, and George Harrison's songwriting.
